critic_notes: CON.1 Kryptokonzept: 4 questions covering CON.1.A1/A2/A4/A10 on algorithm selection, offline key storage, key management scope, and BSI TR 02102 reference. All quote fragments appear in source after dehyphenation of line-break word splits (e.g., `etab-\nlierte` → `etablierte`, `Si-\ncherheitslücken` → `Sicherheitslücken`). Correct answers are faithful paraphrases; distractors (proprietary crypto, cloud-stored long-lived keys, ISO 27001 instead of TR-02102) are unambiguously wrong per the cited requirements. Topic `bausteine` fits. Difficulty calibration reasonable — `experte` on 003 requires combining two MÜSSEN obligations from CON.1.A4. Schema clean.

issues.detail: Fragment `Es MÜSSEN geeignete kryptografische Verfahren ausgewählt werden. Dabei MUSS sichergestellt...` contains line-break hyphen artifact from PDF extraction; matches under dehyphenation within section range.

Fragment `Langlebige kryptografische Schlüssel MÜSSEN offline, außerhalb der eingesetzten IT-Systeme...` contains line-break hyphen artifact from PDF extraction; matches under dehyphenation within section range.
